name: Window Function
description: This node applies window functions to the input DataFrame, allowing operations like ranking, analytical, and aggregate functions over specified windows.
input: It takes one DataFrame as input from the previous node.
output: This node outputs a DataFrame with additional columns computed from the window functions.

fields.name: partitionCols
fields.title: Partition Column Names
fields.description: List of columns to partition by

fields.name: orderCols
fields.title: Order Columns
fields.description: List of columns to order by

fields.name: orderDirections
fields.title: Order Directions
fields.description: Directions (ASC: ascending  or DESC: descending) corresponding to each order column

fields.name: useFrame
fields.title: Specify Frame
fields.description: Unselecting this uses default frame specifications

fields.name: frameType
fields.title: Frame Type
fields.description: Type of frame: ROW for row-based, RANGE for value-based

fields.name: windowTargetColumns
fields.title: Target Column
fields.description: Name of the column that will contain the values returned from the expression(s).

fields.name: windowExpressionsArr
fields.title: Expression
fields.description: Window function expression to apply over the window frame

fields.name: dropColumns
fields.title: Drop Columns
fields.description: Enter the column names needs to be dropped
fields.placeholder: add the column name & press enter.
